empty: No consents recorded for this member yet.
revoke_warning: Revoking this consent stops the processing that relies on it. Some features may stop working immediately.
revoke_reason_placeholder: Optional reason (logged in the audit trail)

admin.title: Consent documents
admin.subtitle: Manage versioned policy / mandate / terms text. Rows are append-only — to revise a document, publish a new version with a later effective date.
admin.append_only_notice: Publishing this version automatically closes the previous active one from the chosen date onward. Earlier versions stay unchanged and auditable.
admin.append_only_explainer: Consent documents are append-only. To change a text, publish a new version with a later effective date. The previous version is closed automatically — already-given consents stay linked to the original version.

block.missing_document_body: No active consent document is published for kind '{{kind}}' / locale '{{locale}}'. An office staff member must upload one first.

agree.sepa: I authorize the SEPA Direct Debit mandate
agree.terms: I agree to the terms of service
agree.coop_contract: I have read and agree to the subscription contract
